## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test --runInBand`
- [ ] `pnpm validate:content`
- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] No secrets, private coordinates, personal paths, copied guide text, or real navigation data
